meaning: n.反证,反驳,反证物,反驳的证据
examples: He could not believe even with the disproof before his eyes.
The ryan plan is a "reductio ad absurdum " a disproof by taking a proposition to a logical conclusion.
Thank you for sending me the preprint of your Disproof.
Equally, a disproof would be the mathematical equivalent of an earthquake, destroying decades of work at a stroke.
Both sciences and businesses advance as much by disproof as by affirmation.
